description: QR code phishing (quishing) templates. These bypass email security filters by encoding malicious URLs in QR code images.
deployment_note: For maximum realism, replace the SVG QR placeholder with an actual QR code image generated from your GoPhish campaign URL. Generate with: qrencode -o qr.png '{{.URL}}' then embed as base64 or host on your campaign server. The manual link ({{.URL}}) is included as a fallback and will be the primary click vector in GoPhish.

templates.name: MFA Re-enrollment QR Code
suggested_subject_lines: Action Required: Re-enroll in Multi-Factor Authentication
IT Security: MFA registration expires — action required today
Mandatory: Update your authenticator app by end of business
templates.notes: Extremely effective against non-technical users. MFA re-enrollment is a plausible IT request that employees can't easily verify. Include a manual link fallback for GoPhish tracking.

templates.name: New Office WiFi QR Code
suggested_subject_lines: IT: Connect to new office WiFi using the QR code below
Facilities & IT: Office network upgrade — connect by Friday
New secure WiFi network — employee action required
templates.notes: WiFi upgrade is a very believable IT scenario. Works well for office return campaigns or after physical office changes. The manual download link is the primary GoPhish tracking vector.

templates.name: Microsoft MFA QR Code Update
suggested_subject_lines: Action Required: Set up Microsoft Authenticator App (MFA)
Microsoft 365 Security: Mandatory MFA Device Registration Update
IT Notice: QR verification required to prevent account lockout
templates.notes: Simulates Microsoft 365 security updates prompting users to scan a QR code to configure the Microsoft Authenticator app.

templates.name: Municipal Unpaid Toll QR Citation
suggested_subject_lines: Notice of Violation: Unpaid road toll invoice
Tolls Bureau: Final warning before court penalty fees
Action Required: Scan QR to settle outstanding vehicle citation
templates.notes: Uses anxiety around outstanding legal/traffic citations and low monetary amounts to bypass standard user skepticism.

templates.name: Scan to View Encrypted Document QR
suggested_subject_lines: Secure Document Shared: Scan QR code to view performance review
Confidential: Encrypted PDF shared in secure workspace
Verification needed: View shared organizational adjustments file
templates.notes: Exploits professional curiosity by claiming an encrypted salary or performance PDF is waiting, but requires scanning a verification QR code.

templates.name: DocuSign Signature Request QR
suggested_subject_lines: DocuSign: Signature required for Mutual NDA and Agreement
Review Document: Please sign pending envelope in DocuSign
Action Required: Scan DocuSign secure access code to execute
templates.notes: Impersonates standard corporate e-signature notification, redirecting the mobile signing workflow via QR.
